description: Immutable RKB evidence snapshot containing CCW dictionary specifications, types, constraints, and valid values for CMS 2021 baseline files.

BENE_ID.name: BENE_ID
BENE_ID.label: Encrypted CCW Beneficiary ID
BENE_ID.description: Unique identifier for the beneficiary assigned by CCW.

BENE_BIRTH_DT.name: BENE_BIRTH_DT
BENE_BIRTH_DT.label: Beneficiary Date of Birth
BENE_BIRTH_DT.description: Date of birth of the beneficiary in YYYYMMDD format.

BENE_DEATH_DT.name: BENE_DEATH_DT
BENE_DEATH_DT.label: Beneficiary Date of Death
BENE_DEATH_DT.description: Date of death of the beneficiary if deceased; null otherwise.

CLM_ID.name: CLM_ID
CLM_ID.label: Claim Control Number
CLM_ID.description: Unique identifier for a claim submitted by a provider or facility.

CLM_FROM_DT.name: CLM_FROM_DT
CLM_FROM_DT.label: Claim Start Date
CLM_FROM_DT.description: The date of service start for carrier line or admission/start for outpatient claim.

CLM_THRU_DT.name: CLM_THRU_DT
CLM_THRU_DT.label: Claim Through Date
CLM_THRU_DT.description: The date of service end for carrier line or discharge/end for outpatient claim.

ICD_DGNS_CD1.name: ICD_DGNS_CD1
ICD_DGNS_CD1.label: Primary Diagnosis Code (ICD-10-CM)
ICD_DGNS_CD1.description: Primary ICD-10-CM diagnosis code associated with the claim event.

CLM_ADMSN_DT.name: CLM_ADMSN_DT
CLM_ADMSN_DT.label: Claim Admission Date
CLM_ADMSN_DT.description: The date the beneficiary was admitted to an inpatient facility.

NCH_BENE_DSCHRG_DT.name: NCH_BENE_DSCHRG_DT
NCH_BENE_DSCHRG_DT.label: Beneficiary Discharge Date
NCH_BENE_DSCHRG_DT.description: The date the beneficiary was discharged from an inpatient facility.

CLM_PMT_AMT.name: CLM_PMT_AMT
CLM_PMT_AMT.label: Claim Payment Amount
CLM_PMT_AMT.description: Total amount paid by Medicare for the claim.

CLM_UTLZTN_DAY_CNT.name: CLM_UTLZTN_DAY_CNT
CLM_UTLZTN_DAY_CNT.label: Utilization Day Count
CLM_UTLZTN_DAY_CNT.description: Number of covered days of inpatient care utilized.

PDE_ID.name: PDE_ID
PDE_ID.label: Prescription Drug Event ID
PDE_ID.description: Unique identifier for a Part D Prescription Drug Event.

NCVD_DAYS_CNT.name: NCVD_DAYS_CNT
NCVD_DAYS_CNT.label: Non-Covered Days Count
NCVD_DAYS_CNT.description: Number of non-covered stay days during a SNF claim stay.

CLM_HHA_LUPA_IND.name: CLM_HHA_LUPA_IND
CLM_HHA_LUPA_IND.label: HHA Low Utilization Payment Adjustment Indicator
CLM_HHA_LUPA_IND.description: Indicator for Low Utilization Payment Adjustment on HHA claims.

DME_LINE_ITEM_COUNT.name: DME_LINE_ITEM_COUNT
DME_LINE_ITEM_COUNT.label: DME Line Item Count
DME_LINE_ITEM_COUNT.description: Number of line items on Durable Medical Equipment claim.

LINE_CMS_TYPE_SRVC_CD.name: LINE_CMS_TYPE_SRVC_CD
LINE_CMS_TYPE_SRVC_CD.label: CMS Type of Service Code
LINE_CMS_TYPE_SRVC_CD.description: Type of service code for DME claim line.

constraints.description: CLM_FROM_DT must be less than or equal to CLM_THRU_DT.
CLM_ADMSN_DT must be less than or equal to NCH_BENE_DSCHRG_DT.
BENE_ID on Carrier, Outpatient, Inpatient, PDE, SNF, HHA, or DME claim must exist in Beneficiary Summary file.
DAYS_SUPLY_NUM and TOT_RX_CST_AMT on PDE events must be non-negative.
CLM_UTLZTN_DAY_CNT and NCVD_DAYS_CNT on SNF claims must be non-negative.
CLM_UTLZTN_DAY_CNT on HHA claims must be non-negative.
DME_LINE_ITEM_COUNT on DME claims must be greater than or equal to 1.
